_comment: Return-history proxies. When a fund's ann_5y or ann_10y is null in fund_snapshots (typically a newly-launched SGD share class), the fact-sheet builder falls back to the proxy ISIN's returns. Convention: proxy is a longer-history share class of the same underlying strategy (USD Acc → SGD Acc, or a sibling MAS-coded SG fund tracking the same index).

LU2420245917.reason: Amundi Idx MSCI World A12S-C SGD (2022 inception) → Amundi IS MSCI World AE-C EUR (2014 inception, same fund family, same underlying index, real monthly NAV back to Dec 2016 for a true month-by-month chart texture)
